explanation: Log categories and appenders are configured in Business Manager under Administration > Operations > Logging.
tip: Cấu hình logging (categories/appenders) thực hiện trong BM: `Administration > Operations > Logging`.

question: A marketer wants to compose landing pages from components. Use: (Select one)
explanation: Use Page Designer to build landing pages from components.
tip: Marketer nên dùng `Page Designer` để ghép các components thành landing page

question: After enabling a locale, search recall drops. What two items are typical causes? (Select two)
options: The searchable attributes lack localized values for the newly enabled locale.
The search index has not been rebuilt since the new locale was enabled.
The dw.json file is missing the locale configuration.
The code version selected does not support multi-language routing.
explanation: Thiếu dữ liệu dịch (localized values) và chưa chạy lại Index cho locale mới là hai nguyên nhân phổ biến nhất khiến tìm kiếm không ra kết quả.

question: To expose a custom object via Data API, which two steps are required? (Select two)
options: Configure OCAPI Data Settings in BM with read/write permissions
Create and map OCAPI client credentials (Client ID)
explanation: Để dùng Data API, cần có Client ID và cấu hình phân quyền (Resources/Methods) trong Business Manager.

question: What is production logging best practice? (Select one)
options: Use Logger categories INFO/WARN/ERROR; DEBUG targeted
explanation: Correct answer: A. Use Logger categories INFO/WARN/ERROR; DEBUG targeted
tip: Sử dụng mức log INFO/WARN/ERROR cho production; chỉ bật DEBUG khi cần kiểm tra.

question: Where do you set default currency and taxation? (Select one)
explanation: Correct answer: A. Administration > Sites > Manage Sites > [Site] > Settings
tip: Cấu hình tiền tệ và thuế tại BM > Administration > Sites > Manage Sites > [Site] > Settings.

question: Which two places commonly hold availability label copy? (Select two)
explanation: Correct answer: A, B. Availability copy thường lưu trong resource properties để dễ dịch, hoặc trực tiếp trong ISML khi cần override hiển thị.
tip: Nội dung nhãn availability thường nằm trong `templates/resources/*.properties` (để localization) hoặc trực tiếp trong ISML template.

question: Maintainable controller design means: (Select one)
options: Thin controllers; domain logic in helpers/decorators/factories
explanation: Correct answer: A. Thin controllers; domain logic in helpers/decorators/factories
tip: Giữ controllers mỏng; di chuyển logic domain vào helpers/decorators/factories để dễ bảo trì.

question: Directive to cache template fragments: (Select one)
explanation: Correct answer: A. iscache
tip: Dùng directive `iscache` trong ISML để cache các fragment tĩnh.

question: Proper CSRF for forms requires: (Select one)
options: Generate token on GET; validate on POST via csrfProtection
explanation: Correct answer: A. Generate token on GET; validate on POST via csrfProtection
tip: Sinh token trên GET và kiểm tra trên POST bằng csrfProtection để ngăn CSRF.

question: For a JSON route, which two are correct? (Select two)
options: Use res.json or write JSON to response
Render ISML, then convert to JSON
explanation: Correct answer: A, B. [A] Set Content-Type to application/json [B] Use res.json or write JSON to response
tip: Trả JSON đúng: đặt Content-Type `application/json` và dùng `res.json` hoặc ghi JSON vào response.

question: You must change pricing logic without editing base controllers. Use: (Select one)
explanation: Correct answer: A. Pricing/tax hook extension points
tip: Dùng hook/extension điểm cho pricing/tax để thay đổi logic mà không sửa controller gốc.

question: A PLP performs a blocking service call per item. Which two help? (Select two)
options: Use Service Framework with timeouts and circuit breaker
explanation: Correct answer: A, B. [A] Use Service Framework with timeouts and circuit breaker [B] Batch/caching to avoid N+1
tip: Dùng Service Framework (timeout/circuit breaker) và batch/caching để tránh N+1.

question: To localize strings, use: (Select two)
options: The dw.web.Resource.msg() or Resource.msgf() methods in scripts or templates.
The ocapi.json configuration for language mapping.
The services.json file for external translation services.
explanation: Localization trong B2C Commerce dựa trên tệp .properties và đối tượng Resource của Script API.
tip: Lưu chuỗi vào `templates/resources/*.properties` và lấy bằng `Resource.msg()` hoặc `Resource.msgf()`.

question: A remote include shows stale promo state. Likely fix: (Select one)
options: Add appropriate vary keys (basket/promo/customer) or disable include caching
explanation: Correct answer: A. Add appropriate vary keys (basket/promo/customer) or disable include caching
tip: Thêm vary keys phù hợp (ví dụ basket/promo/customer) vào cache hoặc tắt cache cho include đó.

question: Safe caching for a personalized Shop API response: (Select one)
options: No cache, or cache with vary (customer group/locale/currency)
explanation: Correct answer: A. No cache, or cache with vary (customer group/locale/currency)
tip: Không cache hoặc cache có vary theo customer group/locale/currency để tránh rò cá nhân hóa.

question: A service returns 200 but error in body. Correct handling: (Select one)
options: Parse domain-level status and handle errors
explanation: Correct answer: B. Parse domain-level status and handle errors
tip: Kiểm tra trạng thái domain trong body (không chỉ HTTP code) và xử lý lỗi tương ứng.

question: PII (Personally Identifiable Information) submissions must: (Select two)
options: Be transmitted over HTTPS and follow data minimization principles.
Have restricted access via OCAPI/Data API settings (Least Privilege).
Be logged in raw format to the service-*.log files for easier support debugging.
Use the GET method to avoid complex CSRF protection middleware.
explanation: Bảo mật PII yêu cầu mã hóa (HTTPS), hạn chế quyền truy cập và tuyệt đối KHÔNG log raw dữ liệu nhạy cảm.
tip: Truyền PII qua HTTPS, áp dụng data minimization và giới hạn quyền truy cập qua OCAPI/Data API.

question: A controller must output a large CSV. Best approach: (Select one)
explanation: Correct answer: A. Stream incrementally with appropriate headers
tip: Xuất CSV lớn bằng cách stream theo phần, đặt headers phù hợp (Content-Type/Disposition) để tránh OOM.

question: Least-privilege Data API on orders requires: (Select two)
options: One shared client for all partners
explanation: Correct answer: A, B. [A] Restrict read_attributes to required fields [B] Dedicated client credentials per integration
tip: Giới hạn `read_attributes` và dùng client credentials riêng cho từng tích hợp (least privilege).

question: Zero-downtime credential rotation should: (Select two)
options: Introduce new credential/profile and cut over
Support overlapping keys if upstream allows
explanation: Correct answer: A, C. [A] Introduce new credential/profile and cut over [C] Support overlapping keys if upstream allows
tip: Tạo credential mới và cutover; nếu có thể, hỗ trợ overlapping keys để tránh downtime.

question: Robust synchronous integration includes: (Select two)
explanation: Correct answer: A, B. [A] Short timeouts and circuit breaker [B] Retries with exponential backoff
tip: Sử dụng timeouts ngắn + circuit breaker và retry với exponential backoff cho tích hợp đồng bộ.

question: Frequent product deltas. Best indexing policy: (Select one)
explanation: Correct answer: A. Delta index after each import
tip: Với thay đổi sản phẩm thường xuyên, chạy delta index sau mỗi import.

question: To write to a custom object via Data API, you need: (Select two)
options: Client credentials mapped to that ocapi.json setting
explanation: Correct answer: A, B. [A] ocapi.json write with write_attributes [B] Client credentials mapped to that ocapi.json setting
tip: Cần cấu hình `ocapi.json` cho write (write_attributes) và client credentials tương ứng.

question: Two job steps intermittently conflict because they attempt to update the same database records simultaneously. What is the best architectural remedy?
options: Implement a locking/serialization strategy or schedule the steps in mutually exclusive time windows.
Disable 'Communication Logs' to reduce the database transaction overhead.
Use 'Remote Includes' in the job script to offload the update logic to a different thread.
Increase the 'Global Cache' TTL to prevent the database from checking record status.
explanation: Khi có xung đột cập nhật, bạn phải đảm bảo tính tuần tự (Serialization) bằng cách sử dụng cơ chế khóa (Locking) hoặc tách biệt thời gian chạy (Mutually exclusive windows) để đảm bảo tại một thời điểm chỉ có một Job được quyền ghi vào bản ghi đó.
tip: Job conflict/Record contention -> Luôn chọn 'Locking', 'Serialization' hoặc 'Exclusive windows'. Đừng bao giờ chọn Log hay Cache.

question: How can a developer prevent sensitive data (like API tokens or passwords) from leaking into service log files?
options: Implement redacting or masking logic within the service response parser and avoid logging full bodies unless masked.
Use System.out.println() instead of Logger to bypass the service logging framework.
Set the service log level to ALWAYS DEBUG to ensure all data is captured and encrypted by the platform.
Disable the 'Communication Log' setting in Business Manager for all production services.
explanation: Để bảo vệ thông tin nhạy cảm, bạn phải can thiệp vào bước parse dữ liệu (parser). Tại đây, bạn sẽ tìm các trường nhạy cảm và thay thế chúng bằng dấu '*' hoặc xóa bỏ trước khi đẩy dữ liệu vào log của hệ thống.
tip: Log Security -> Luôn chọn 'Redact/Mask' hoặc 'Filter'. Tuyệt đối không chọn 'System.out' hay 'Disable Log'.

question: Shop API varies by price group and locale. Safe caching: (Select one)
options: No cache or cache with appropriate vary keys
explanation: Correct answer: A. No cache or cache with appropriate vary keys
tip: Cache an toàn cho Shop API: không cache hoặc cache kèm `vary` theo `price group` và `locale` để tránh rò dữ liệu cá nhân hóa.

question: Reduce PDP TTFB by: (Select two)
options: Cache static fragments with iscache and proper vary
explanation: Correct answer: A, B. [A] Precompute heavy fields in decorators [B] Cache static fragments with iscache and proper vary
tip: Giảm TTFB: tiền tính toán các trường nặng trong decorators và cache các fragment tĩnh bằng `iscache` với `vary` phù hợp.

question: Profiler shows heavy per-item service calls. Improve by: (Select two)
options: Compute offline via jobs; decorate from storage
explanation: Correct answer: A, B. [A] Batch/cache calls [B] Compute offline via jobs; decorate from storage
tip: Tối ưu các cuộc gọi dịch vụ: gom batch hoặc cache kết quả; tính toán offline bằng job và decorate từ lưu trữ để tránh N+1.

question: Stale content persists post-deploy. Likely actions: (Select two)
explanation: Correct answer: A, B. [A] Clear application cache [B] Invalidate iscache fragments
tip: Nội dung cũ sau deploy: xóa application cache trong BM và invalidate các fragment `iscache` để cập nhật template/fragment mới.

question: A large JSON export results in Out of Memory (OOM) errors. What is the correct approach?
options: Stream JSON chunks directly to the response output writer.
Build the full JSON object in memory and then call res.json().
Increase the JVM heap size in the instance settings.
Split the export into 10 separate ISML templates.
explanation: Với dữ liệu lớn, việc build object trong bộ nhớ sẽ gây lỗi OOM. Cần dùng cơ chế streaming để ghi dữ liệu trực tiếp ra response.
tip: Xuất JSON lớn bằng cách stream theo khối (chunk) trực tiếp ra response, tránh build toàn bộ object trong RAM.

question: Cache correctness issues often come from: (Select two)
explanation: Correct answer: A, B. Missing vary-by-locale/currency or having a global cache without appropriate vary keys commonly cause incorrect cached content.
tip: Vấn đề cache thường do thiếu `vary` theo `locale`/`currency` hoặc dùng cache toàn cục mà không có `vary` — kiểm tra keys và cấu hình cache.

question: New locale shows English strings instead of translations. Fix: (Select two)
options: Ensure the localized .properties files exist for that specific locale code.
Check that the Resource.msg() keys in the ISML match the keys in the properties files.
Update the ocapi.json to include the new locale ID.
Switch to a new code version and re-upload the cartridges.
explanation: Lỗi này thường do thiếu file dịch hoặc sai Key trong file .properties.
tip: Kiểm tra tồn tại file `templates/resources/` cho locale đó và đảm bảo key trong `Resource.msg()` khớp với file `.properties` tương ứng.

question: A route times out on a downstream service. Best practices: (Select three)
explanation: Correct answer: A, B, C. [A] Short timeouts (fail fast) [B] Retries with backoff [C] Circuit breaker
tip: Giải pháp khi service chậm: đặt timeout ngắn, retry với backoff và dùng circuit breaker để tránh cascading failures.

question: PDP slowed after release. Which three diagnostics help? (Select three)
explanation: Correct answer: A, B, C. [A] Compare profiler traces before/after [B] Add targeted timing logs [C] Diff changed services/decorators/hooks
tip: Chẩn đoán PDP chậm: so sánh profiler trước/sau, thêm logs đo thời gian cụ thể và diff các thay đổi service/decorator/hook.

question: Lower ISML CPU by: (Select two)
explanation: Correct answer: A, B. [A] Precompute in helpers/decorators [B] Cache static fragments
tip: Giảm CPU dùng ISML: tính trước trong helpers/decorators và cache các fragment tĩnh (iscache) thay vì lặp/logic nặng trong template.

question: A Page Designer component shows the wrong currency when cached. What is the fix?
options: Disable caching for the entire page.
Add 'currency' as a vary-by parameter in the component's cache configuration.
Configure the currency settings in ocapi.json.
explanation: Nếu component hiển thị sai tiền tệ khi có cache, đó là do nó đang dùng chung cache cho mọi loại tiền. Cần thêm 'vary-by currency' để hệ thống tạo ra các bản cache riêng biệt.
tip: Dữ liệu cá nhân hóa (tiền, giá, khuyến mãi) bị sai khi cache -> Phải thêm 'Vary-by' key.

question: Prevent duplicate POST submissions: (Select two)
explanation: Correct answer: A, B. [A] Idempotency keys with server-side dedupe [B] Disable submit button after click
tip: Sử dụng idempotency key phía server để loại trùng và vô hiệu hóa nút gửi sau khi click; cân nhắc dùng Post/Redirect/Get để tránh double-submit.

question: Catalog import and delta index conflict. Remedy: (Select one)
explanation: Correct answer: A. Coordinate schedules/locks and add retries/backoff
tip: Điều phối lịch chạy, sử dụng locking/serialization và thêm retry với backoff để tránh xung đột giữa import và delta index.

question: A developer uploads a new custom cartridge via WebDAV to the active code version, but controllers are not being resolved. What two steps are most likely missing? (Select two)
options: Adding the cartridge to the site’s cartridge path (typically ahead of app_storefront_base).
Clearing the application and template caches in Business Manager.
Rebuilding the product search indexes to register new routes.
Assigning the cartridge to the Organization-level cartridge path only.
explanation: Để Controller hoạt động, cartridge phải nằm trong Cartridge Path của Site và đôi khi cần xóa cache để hệ thống cập nhật ánh xạ URL mới.
tip: Thêm cartridge vào cartridge path của site (thường trước app_storefront_base) và xóa application/template cache trong BM.

question: Which statement about site code version configuration is accurate? (Select one)
options: All sites must share a single code version.
Each site references a specific code version in its Settings independently.
The code version is activated at the instance level via Administration > Site Development > Code Versions.
The code version is inferred automatically from the cartridge path.
explanation: Code version được quản lý và kích hoạt (Activate) ở cấp độ Instance (Administration). Sau khi active, nó áp dụng cho các site sử dụng version đó.
tip: Code Versions được Activate ở cấp Instance (Administration > Site Development > Code Versions).

question: Where should you place a new ISML template to override a template from app_storefront_base? (Select one)
options: In the same relative path and folder structure within a custom cartridge that has higher priority in the cartridge path.
In the 'Search Refinements' configuration within Business Manager.
Directly inside the app_storefront_base cartridge to ensure it's found.
explanation: Cơ chế override của B2C dựa trên thứ tự cartridge path. File ở cartridge đứng trước sẽ ghi đè file cùng tên/đường dẫn ở cartridge đứng sau.
tip: Đặt ISML override trong custom cartridge cùng đường dẫn tương đối và đảm bảo cartridge đó đứng trước trong cartridge path.

question: What is the recommended cartridge order for standard SFRA customization? (Select one)
options: app_storefront_base first, then all custom cartridges
explanation: Correct answer: B. custom cartridges first, then app_storefront_base
tip: Đặt custom cartridges trước app_storefront_base trong cartridge path để cho phép override và extension.

question: After switching a site to a new code version, templates show stale content. What is the most appropriate first action? (Select one)
options: Clear application cache and invalidate any relevant iscache fragments
Change the code version name again
explanation: Correct answer: B. Clear application cache and invalidate any relevant iscache fragments
tip: Sau khi đổi code version, hãy clear application cache và invalidate iscache fragments trước khi thử các bước khác.

question: Which two items are set at the site level in Business Manager for a newly added site? (Select two)
options: OCAPI Client ID and Secret assignments.
explanation: Khi tạo site mới, hai cấu hình quan trọng nhất là định danh tiền tệ/thuế và khai báo các cartridge sẽ sử dụng cho site đó.
tip: Cấu hình mặc định tiền tệ/thuế và cartridge path được quản lý ở cấp Site trong Business Manager.

question: A team needs a custom site preference that toggles a feature flag. What is the correct approach? (Select one)
options: Add a new property to ocapi.json
Add a custom site preference group and preference in BM, then reference it in code
Add a new setting in dw.json
explanation: Custom Site Preferences được dùng để lưu trữ các cấu hình có thể thay đổi trong BM mà không cần sửa code.
tip: Tạo custom site preference group và preference trong BM, rồi đọc giá trị đó trong code để bật/tắt tính năng.

question: Which two directories are used for code deployment and data import respectively? (Select two)
explanation: Correct answer: A, B. [A] /versioned/cartridges/<code-version>/cartridges for code [B] /impex/src/ for data import
tip: Mã nguồn triển khai vào `/versioned/cartridges/<code-version>/cartridges`; dữ liệu import đặt trong `/impex/src/`.

question: A merchant requests two different cartridge paths for two locales on the same site. What is the correct guidance? (Select one)
options: Cartridge paths can vary per locale
Cartridge path is site-level; implement locale differences in code/templates
Cartridge path is global for the instance
explanation: Correct answer: B. Cartridge path is configured at the Site level; implement locale-specific behavior via code/templates or other locale-aware configuration.
tip: Cartridge path là cấu hình ở cấp Site. Để hỗ trợ locale khác nhau, xử lý trong code/templates hoặc dùng cấu hình locale-aware, không thay cartridge path per-locale.

question: What is the purpose of app_*.properties inside a cartridge? (Select one)
options: To define cartridge metadata such as id and version
explanation: Correct answer: C. To manage OCAPI access
tip: Tệp `app_*.properties` được dùng để cấu hình liên quan tới ứng dụng; trong ngữ cảnh OCAPI nó thường chứa thiết lập liên quan đến truy cập/endpoint.

question: How do Organization-level and Site-level cartridge paths interact? (Select one)
options: They are merged; Site-level ordering is applied after Organization-level
Site-level is ignored if Organization-level exists
explanation: Correct answer: B. They are merged; Site-level ordering is applied after Organization-level
tip: Organization-level và Site-level cartridge paths được hợp nhất; thứ tự Site-level được áp dụng sau Organization-level.

question: You observe that a newly uploaded cartridge is not visible under “Code Versions.” What is the likely cause? (Select one)
options: Uploaded to the wrong path (not under /versioned/cartridges/<code-version>/cartridges)
explanation: Correct answer: A. Uploaded to the wrong path (not under /versioned/cartridges/<code-version>/cartridges)
tip: Kiểm tra xem cartridge đã được upload vào ` /versioned/cartridges/<code-version>/cartridges` chưa và đảm bảo cấu trúc đường dẫn chính xác.

question: Where do you configure a new search refinement definition (facet)? (Select one)
options: Merchant Tools > Products and Catalogs > Catalogs
explanation: Correct answer: A. Merchant Tools > Search > Search Refinements
tip: Mở Business Manager > Merchant Tools > Search > Search Refinements để thêm hoặc cấu hình facet mới.

question: Which two steps are required to make a product attribute searchable? (Select two)
options: Mark the attribute as searchable in its System Object definition (Product).
Rebuild the product search indexes in Business Manager.
Add the attribute to the ocapi.json file in the custom cartridge.
Assign the attribute to a Page Designer component.
explanation: Quy trình: Bật tính năng searchable cho attribute -> Chạy Rebuild Search Index để dữ liệu xuất hiện trong tìm kiếm.
tip: Đánh dấu attribute là searchable trong System Object (Product) và chạy Rebuild Index trong BM để cập nhật dữ liệu.

question: To display a new attribute on PDP, which two areas are typically involved? (Select two)
options: Extending the product model via a decorator or factory script.
Modifying the PDP ISML template to render the new attribute value.
Creating a new code version for the site.
Configuring a new Service Profile in Business Manager.
explanation: Để hiển thị dữ liệu mới: Bước 1 là xử lý logic ở tầng Model (Decorator/Factory), Bước 2 là hiển thị ở tầng View (ISML).
tip: Thêm logic vào product decorator/factory và cập nhật ISML trên PDP để render giá trị mới.

question: A merchandiser wants synonyms to map “hoodie” to “hooded sweatshirt” without mapping the reverse. Where is this configured and what pattern is used? (Select one)
options: Merchant Tools > Search > Dictionaries; one-way synonym
Merchant Tools > Search > Search Refinements; two-way synonym
explanation: Correct answer: B. Merchant Tools > Search > Dictionaries; one-way synonym
tip: Tạo một one-way synonym trong Business Manager: Merchant Tools > Search > Dictionaries để ánh xạ không đảo ngược.

question: You must expose a custom object via OCAPI Data for an integration. Which two actions are required? (Select two)
options: Configure OCAPI Data Settings in BM with the appropriate resource permissions and attribute lists.
Ensure the Client ID used has the necessary scope and permissions assigned in Business Manager.
Add the custom object definition to the site's cartridge path.
Rebuild the search index to include custom object data.
explanation: OCAPI không tự động mở quyền. Bạn phải khai báo quyền truy cập Resource và gán nó cho một Client ID cụ thể.
tip: Cấu hình OCAPI Data trong BM với resource và attributes phù hợp, và gán quyền cho Client ID được sử dụng.

question: Where are log categories and appenders configured? (Select one)
explanation: Correct answer: A. Business Manager > Administration > Operations > Logging
tip: Cấu hình log categories và appenders trong BM: Administration > Operations > Logging.

question: A merchandiser wants to assemble a landing page with reusable components. Which feature is most appropriate? (Select one)
explanation: Page Designer là công cụ cho phép Merchandiser tạo trang bằng cách kéo thả các component có tính tái sử dụng cao mà không cần can thiệp code.
tip: Sử dụng Page Designer để build landing pages bằng component tái sử dụng trong BM.

question: Search results return fewer products after enabling a new locale. What two issues are typical? (Select two)
options: Missing localized values for searchable attributes in the new locale.
The search index has not been rebuilt for the new locale.
explanation: Để tìm kiếm hoạt động trên locale mới, bạn cần có dữ liệu thuộc tính đã dịch (localized data) và phải chạy Reindex để cập nhật dữ liệu vào bộ tìm kiếm.
tip: Đảm bảo giá trị localized tồn tại cho attribute và chạy Rebuild Search Index cho locale đó.

question: You added a new searchable attribute, but it doesn’t appear in the storefront facet menu. Which two steps are likely missing? (Select two)
options: Assigning the attribute to the Search Refinement Definition in Business Manager.
Rebuilding the Search Index to include the new attribute data.
Adding the attribute to the ocapi.json configuration file.
explanation: Để thuộc tính hiện thành bộ lọc (facet), nó phải được định nghĩa trong Search Refinements và Index phải được chạy lại.
tip: Thêm attribute vào Search Refinements trong BM và chạy Rebuild Index để dữ liệu xuất hiện trên storefront.

question: What is the best practice for logging? (Select one)
options: Use Logger with dedicated category/file and appropriate levels (INFO/WARN/ERROR)
Log everything at DEBUG in production
explanation: Correct answer: A. Use Logger with dedicated category/file and appropriate levels (INFO/WARN/ERROR)
tip: Sử dụng Logger với category và mức hợp lý (INFO/WARN/ERROR); tránh System.out.println và debug verbose trong production.

question: Where is site import/export managed? (Select one)
explanation: Correct answer: A. Merchant Tools > Site Import & Export
tip: Site import/export được quản lý tại Merchant Tools > Site Import & Export trong Business Manager.

question: Which two Business Manager areas are primarily used by merchandisers vs. developers? (Select two)
explanation: Correct answer: A, B. [A] Content and Page Designer (merchandisers) [B] Search and Dictionaries (merchandisers)
tip: Merchandisers thường dùng Content/Page Designer và Search/Dictionaries; developers chịu trách nhiệm Code Versions và Services.

question: A route returns JSON for a headless client. Which two are correct? (Select two)
options: Use res.json or write JSON string; avoid rendering ISML
Always reuse PDP ISML to ensure consistency
explanation: Correct answer: A, B. Set the correct Content-Type and return JSON via res.json or write JSON; avoid rendering ISML for API routes.
tip: Trả về JSON cho API: set Content-Type `application/json` và dùng `res.json`/write JSON; không render ISML cho endpoint headless.

question: Which middleware should be used around POST form handlers? (Select one)
explanation: Correct answer: A. csrfProtection.validateRequest (with generateToken in GET render)
tip: Dùng csrfProtection.validateRequest cho POST handlers và generateToken khi render form GET.

question: A new decorator adds computed fields to the product model. Where should this logic live? (Select one)
explanation: Correct answer: B. Product decorators and/or factory
tip: Đặt logic tính toán trường bổ sung trong product decorator hoặc factory, không trong ISML hay ocapi.json.

question: You need to capture basket pricing adjustments without changing core controllers. What mechanism is intended? (Select one)
explanation: Correct answer: B. Documented hooks (e.g., pricing/tax calculation hooks)
tip: Sử dụng documented hooks (pricing/tax hooks) để áp dụng pricing adjustments mà không sửa core controllers.

question: A controller is doing blocking HTTP per product on a listing page. Which two improvements help? (Select two)
options: Use the Service Framework with timeouts and circuit breaker
Aggregate/batch calls or cache responses to avoid N+1 patterns
explanation: Correct answer: A, B. [A] Use the Service Framework with timeouts and circuit breaker [B] Aggregate/batch calls or cache responses to avoid N+1 patterns
tip: Dùng Service Framework với timeout/circuit breaker và tránh pattern N+1 bằng batch/aggregation hoặc cache.

question: In an ISML template, which directive allows separately cachable fragments? (Select one)
explanation: Correct answer: A. iscache
tip: Sử dụng `iscache` directive để định nghĩa các fragment có thể cache riêng biệt trong ISML.

question: A controller must render cached content that varies by locale and currency. What should be used? (Select one)
options: res.cachePeriod with varyBy keys or iscache vary attributes
explanation: Correct answer: A. res.cachePeriod with varyBy keys or iscache vary attributes
tip: Sử dụng `res.cachePeriod` với varyBy keys hoặc `iscache` vary attributes để cache đúng theo locale/currency.

question: A POST endpoint ingests JSON into a custom object. Which two precautions are mandatory? (Select two)
options: Validate input, enforce size limits, and reject malformed payloads
Log full payloads at DEBUG for later inspection
explanation: Correct answer: A, B. Validate and limit input; apply CSRF protection where applicable.
tip: Validate payloads và áp dụng CSRF protection; log payloads cẩn trọng ở môi trường dev/debug, không ở production.

question: A service responds with HTTP 200 but an application-level error. How should failure be detected? (Select one)
options: Parse response body and check domain status codes/fields per contract
explanation: Correct answer: B. Parse response body and check domain status codes/fields per contract
tip: Kiểm tra nội dung response body theo hợp đồng API để phát hiện lỗi ứng dụng ngay cả khi HTTP status là 200.

question: The Shop API response is personalized. Which two caching strategies are safe? (Select two)
options: Cache with vary keys including customer group, locale, currency
explanation: Correct answer: A, B. [A] No caching [B] Cache with appropriate vary keys (customer group, locale, currency) to preserve personalization
tip: Chọn cache có các vary key phù hợp hoặc không cache nếu response cá nhân hoá.

question: Which pattern helps keep controllers thin and maintainable? (Select one)
explanation: Correct answer: A. Move complex rules to helpers/decorators/factories
tip: Đưa logic phức tạp ra helpers/decorators/factories để controller mỏng và dễ bảo trì.

question: When must you use remote includes over local includes? (Select one)
options: When the included content must execute in a separate pipeline with its own cache behavior
explanation: Correct answer: A. When the included content must execute in a separate pipeline with its own cache behavior
tip: Dùng remote include khi nội dung cần pipeline hoặc cơ chế cache riêng.

question: To expose baskets via OCAPI Shop, which two steps are required? (Select two)
options: ocapi.json Shop permissions for basket resources with allowed attributes
Create and map client credentials to that ocapi.json setting
Add the Shop resource in Page Designer
explanation: Correct answer: A, B. [A] ocapi.json Shop permissions for basket resources with allowed attributes [B] Create and map client credentials to that ocapi.json setting
tip: Cấu hình ocapi.json cho Shop và mapping client credentials tương ứng.

question: A nightly job imports inventory and reindexes search. Which two steps are typical? (Select two)
options: Script step to perform inventory import
System step to trigger delta or full indexing
explanation: Correct answer: A, B. [A] Script step to perform inventory import [B] System step to trigger delta or full indexing
tip: Tạo step import (script) và step indexing (system) trong job hàng đêm.

question: Which import folders are typically used for inbound data files? (Select two)
explanation: Correct answer: A, B. [A] /impex/src/ [B] /impex/src/instance/
tip: Dùng `impex/src/` hoặc `impex/src/instance/` cho file import inbound.

question: A job intermittently fails due to file locks on import. What two mitigations help? (Select two)
explanation: Correct answer: A, B. [A] Add retry with exponential backoff [B] Coordinate schedules/locks to avoid overlap
tip: Thêm retry/backoff và điều phối lịch/lock tránh trùng lặp.

question: An integration requires least-privilege OCAPI Data access to orders. Which two are correct? (Select two)
options: Restrict read_attributes to required fields only
Use a shared client for all partners
explanation: Correct answer: A, C. [A] Restrict read_attributes to required fields only [C] Issue dedicated credentials per integration
tip: Áp dụng least-privilege: chỉ cấp thuộc tính cần thiết và credentials riêng.

question: A service credential must be rotated with zero downtime. What two steps help? (Select two)
options: Introduce a new credential/profile, cut over in config, then remove old
Support overlapping key validity if upstream allows
explanation: Correct answer: A, C. [A] Introduce a new credential/profile, cut over in config, then remove old [C] Support overlapping key validity if upstream allows
tip: Tạo credential mới và hỗ trợ overlapping validity để chuyển đổi không downtime.

question: Which two steps improve robustness of a synchronous integration? (Select two)
options: Configure short timeouts and a circuit breaker
Implement retries with exponential backoff for transient failures
explanation: Correct answer: A, B. [A] Configure short timeouts and a circuit breaker [B] Implement retries with exponential backoff for transient failures
tip: Dùng timeouts ngắn, circuit breaker và retries/backoff cho tích hợp đồng bộ.

question: A PIM sends product deltas hourly. What indexing policy is most efficient? (Select one)
explanation: Correct answer: A. Delta reindex after each import
tip: Dùng delta reindex sau mỗi import thay vì full reindex thường xuyên.

question: A partner needs to call a Data API that writes to a custom object. What two items are mandatory? (Select two)
options: Client credentials with that ocapi.json setting
explanation: Correct answer: A, B. [A] ocapi.json write_permissions with write_attributes listed [B] Client credentials with that ocapi.json setting
tip: Cấu hình `ocapi.json` cho write và mapping client credentials tương ứng.

question: A job must run two steps that update the same objects and occasionally collide. What should you implement? (Select one)
explanation: Correct answer: B. Locking/serialization or mutually exclusive windows
tip: Triển khai locking/serialization hoặc windows độc lập để tránh va chạm cập nhật.

question: An upstream service returns sensitive tokens. How do you prevent leakage to logs? (Select one)
options: Redact tokens in the Service parser before logging; avoid logging bodies unless masked
explanation: Correct answer: A. Redact tokens in the Service parser before logging; avoid logging bodies unless masked
tip: Ẩn/mask token trong Service parser trước khi ghi log; không log body nhạy cảm.

question: A shop API endpoint needs to be personalized by pricelist and locale. Which is safest? (Select one)
options: Add vary-by customer group/pricelist and locale or disable cache
explanation: Correct answer: B. Add vary-by customer group/pricelist and locale or disable cache
tip: Thêm vary-by cho pricelist/locale hoặc tắt cache nếu cần cá nhân hoá.

question: Which two techniques reduce controller TTFB for a PDP? (Select two)
options: Precompute heavy fields in decorators; avoid blocking calls per request
Use iscache for static fragments and proper vary keys
explanation: Correct answer: A, B. [A] Precompute heavy fields in decorators; avoid blocking calls per request [B] Use iscache for static fragments and proper vary keys
tip: Tiền xử lý trường nặng và dùng `iscache` cho fragment tĩnh với vary hợp lý.

question: The profiler shows 35% of time is spent in a service call per product on PLP tiles. Which two mitigations help most? (Select two)
options: Move computation offline via jobs; fetch precomputed attributes
explanation: Correct answer: A, B. [A] Batch/aggregate calls and cache responses [B] Move computation offline via jobs; fetch precomputed attributes
tip: Gộp/caching service calls hoặc tiền tính offline để giảm latency.

question: You see stale promotion details in a remote include. What is the likely cause? (Select one)
options: Missing vary key for promo/basket state on the include
explanation: Correct answer: A. Missing vary key for promo/basket state on the include
tip: Kiểm tra và thêm vary key cho trạng thái promo/basket trên remote include.

question: A large JSON export endpoint exhausts memory. Which is the correct approach? (Select one)
options: Stream JSON chunks to response; avoid building huge objects in memory
Convert to ISML then to JSON
explanation: Correct answer: A. Stream JSON chunks to response; avoid building huge objects in memory
tip: Stream response theo chunk thay vì dựng toàn bộ object trong memory.

question: Which two cause cache correctness issues in localized sites? (Select two)
options: Using global cache with no vary
explanation: Correct answer: A, B. [A] Missing vary-by-locale/currency [B] Using global cache with no vary
tip: Thiếu vary-by cho locale/currency hoặc cache toàn cục không có vary gây sai nội dung.

question: A new locale was added, but many UI strings show in English. Which two are typical fixes? (Select two)
options: Add templates/resources/*.properties files for the new locale
Use Resource.msg/Resource.msgf to fetch localized strings
explanation: Correct answer: A, B. [A] Add templates/resources/*.properties files for the new locale [B] Use Resource.msg/Resource.msgf to fetch localized strings
tip: Thêm `templates/resources/*.properties` cho locale và dùng `Resource.msg/Resource.msgf`.

question: A controller experiences timeouts downstream. Which three resiliency steps are best practice? (Select three)
options: Retries with exponential backoff and circuit breaker
explanation: Correct answer: A, B, C. [A] Fail fast (short timeouts) [B] Retries with exponential backoff and circuit breaker [C] Graceful degradation (cached/placeholder content)
tip: Thiết lập timeouts ngắn, retries/circuit breaker và graceful degradation.

question: After release, PDP render time increased by 250ms. Which three diagnostics help? (Select three)
options: Compare profiler traces for the route before vs. after
Add targeted timing logs to isolate hotspots
explanation: Correct answer: A, B, C. [A] Compare profiler traces for the route before vs. after [B] Add targeted timing logs to isolate hotspots [C] Diff changes in services/decorators/hooks
tip: So sánh profiler, thêm timing logs và diff code để tìm nguyên nhân.

question: Which two strategies lower ISML template CPU time? (Select two)
options: Move complex logic to helpers/decorators; pass view-ready data
Add blocking HTTP calls in template
Add loops with heavy computation in ISML
explanation: Correct answer: A, B. [A] Move complex logic to helpers/decorators; pass view-ready data [B] Cache static fragments with iscache
tip: Đưa logic nặng ra decorators và cache fragment tĩnh bằng `iscache`.

question: A Page Designer component shows incorrect currency on cache hits. What is the fix? (Select one)
options: Add vary-by-currency on the cached fragment
Switch to a different code version
explanation: Correct answer: A. Add vary-by-currency on the cached fragment
tip: Thêm vary-by-currency trên fragment được cache để hiển thị đúng tiền tệ.

question: You must ensure that duplicate POST submissions don’t create duplicate orders. Which two mitigations help? (Select two)
options: Client-side submit button disable to prevent double-click
explanation: Correct answer: A, B. [A] Idempotency keys with server-side deduplication [B] Client-side submit button disable to prevent double-click
tip: Dùng idempotency key server-side và disable nút gửi ở client.

question: A catalog import job and a delta indexing job conflict occasionally. What’s the best solution? (Select one)
options: Coordinate schedules with locking and order; add retries/backoff
explanation: Correct answer: A. Coordinate schedules with locking and order; add retries/backoff
tip: Điều phối lịch, locking và thêm retry/backoff để tránh xung đột.

question: A cartridge was uploaded to the correct code version, but custom routes still return 404. What’s the most likely root cause? (Select one)
options: Cartridge missing from the Site’s cartridge path or ordered after app_storefront_base
explanation: Correct answer: B. Cartridge missing from the Site’s cartridge path or ordered after app_storefront_base
tip: Kiểm tra cartridge path và thứ tự; cartridge tùy chỉnh phải đứng trước `app_storefront_base`.

question: What is the correct directory to upload code for the active code version? (Select one)
explanation: Correct answer: B. /versioned/cartridges/<code-version>/cartridges
tip: Upload code vào `versioned/cartridges/<code-version>/cartridges` cho code version đang active.

question: An override template is ignored by the storefront. Which two issues are common? (Select two)
options: The override file path/name doesn’t match the base template structure exactly.
The custom cartridge appears after app_storefront_base in the site's cartridge path.
The override was not registered in the Business Manager's Services section.
The code version label must be identical to the site ID.
explanation: Correct answer: A, B. Cartridge override must match path/name exactly and cartridge must be ordered before base cartridge.
tip: Đảm bảo đường dẫn/tên file override khớp và cartridge tùy chỉnh đứng trước cartridge gốc.

question: Which statement about code versions is accurate? (Select one)
options: A single global code version controls all sites
Each site references a specific code version in its Settings
Code versions are defined only in dw.json
Code version is inferred from the cartridge path
explanation: Correct answer: B. Each site references a specific code version in its site settings (Business Manager)
tip: Mỗi site có tham chiếu code version riêng trong Site Settings.

question: After changing the site’s referenced code version, you still see old templates. Which two actions are recommended first? (Select two)
explanation: Correct answer: A, B. [A] Clear application cache [B] Invalidate relevant template caches (iscache)
tip: Clear application cache và invalidate cache template (`iscache`) trước.

question: Where is the active code version set? (Select one)
options: BM > Administration > Site Development > Code Versions
explanation: Correct answer: A. BM > Administration > Site Development > Code Versions
tip: Trong Business Manager: Administration > Site Development > Code Versions.

question: What does dw.json define? (Select one)
options: IDE/WebDAV connection and target code version
explanation: Correct answer: B. IDE/WebDAV connection and target code version (dw.json)
tip: `dw.json` dùng để cấu hình IDE/WebDAV và target code version.

question: The business asks for different cartridge paths per locale. Correct guidance is: (Select one)
options: Not supported; one site-level path; handle locale in code/templates
explanation: Correct answer: B. Not supported; cartridge path is site-level—handle locale differences in code/templates or site configuration
tip: Cartridge path là cấu hình ở mức site, không per-locale; xử lý locale bằng code/templates.

question: Which file holds cartridge metadata such as id/description? (Select one)
explanation: Correct answer: B. `app_*.properties` typically holds application/cartridge labels and descriptions used in Business Manager UIs
tip: Kiểm tra `app_*.properties` cho metadata hiển thị trong Business Manager; đánh dấu `needs_review` nếu cần xác nhận.

question: How to enforce HTTPS on specific routes? (Select one)
explanation: Correct answer: A. Add server.middleware.https on those routes
tip: Thêm `server.middleware.https` cho route cần bắt buộc HTTPS.

question: A cartridge is uploaded but doesn’t appear in the site-path picker. Most likely why? (Select one)
options: Not a valid cartridge structure (missing cartridge/ folder)
explanation: Correct answer: B. Not a valid cartridge structure (missing cartridge/ folder)
tip: Kiểm tra cấu trúc cartridge (phải có thư mục `cartridge/` hợp lệ).

question: Where do you import catalogs/inventory files? (Select one)
options: BM > Merchant Tools > Site Import & Export
explanation: Correct answer: A. BM > Merchant Tools > Site Import & Export
tip: Import catalog/inventory via Business Manager: Merchant Tools > Site Import & Export.

question: To make a new attribute searchable, which two steps are necessary? (Select two)
explanation: Correct answer: A, C. [A] Mark the attribute as searchable in attribute definition [C] Rebuild the search index so it's indexed
tip: Đánh dấu attribute là searchable và reindex để có hiệu lực.

question: Where are search refinements (facets) configured? (Select one)
explanation: Correct answer: A. Merchant Tools > Search > Search Refinements
tip: Cấu hình search refinements trong Business Manager: Merchant Tools > Search > Search Refinements.

question: A one-way synonym “joggers → sweatpants” is needed. Where do you set it? (Select one)
explanation: Correct answer: B. Search > Dictionaries (one-way)
tip: Thêm one-way synonym trong Merchant Tools > Search > Dictionaries.

question: To display a new PDP field, which two layers are updated? (Select two)
options: Product model decorators/factory to expose value
PDP ISML template to render it
explanation: Correct answer: A, B. [A] Update product model/decorators to expose the value [B] Update PDP ISML template to render it
tip: Cập nhật model/decorator để expose dữ liệu và template ISML để hiển thị.

question: Where do you configure log categories and appenders? (Select one)
explanation: Correct answer: A. BM > Administration > Operations > Logging
tip: Cấu hình logging (categories/appenders) trong Business Manager > Administration > Operations > Logging.

question: A marketer wants to build a landing page using reusable pieces. Which tool fits? (Select one)
explanation: Correct answer: A. Page Designer
tip: Dùng Page Designer để build landing pages bằng các component tái sử dụng.

question: After enabling another locale, search returns fewer results. Likely causes? (Select two)
explanation: Correct answer: A, B. [A] Missing localized attribute values [B] Forgot to reindex
tip: Kiểm tra giá trị attribute đã được localize và reindex sau khi thêm locale.

question: To expose a custom object via Data API, which two actions are required? (Select two)
options: Configure ocapi.json with read/write and attribute lists
explanation: Correct answer: A, B. [A] Configure ocapi.json with read/write and attribute lists [B] Create and map client credentials
tip: Cấu hình `ocapi.json` cho object và map client credentials tương ứng.

question: Production logging best practice is: (Select one)
options: Logger categories at INFO/WARN/ERROR; DEBUG used sparingly
explanation: Correct answer: A. Logger categories at INFO/WARN/ERROR; DEBUG used sparingly
tip: Sử dụng levels INFO/WARN/ERROR; hạn chế DEBUG trong production.

question: Where do you configure default currency/taxation? (Select one)
explanation: Correct answer: A. Administration > Sites > Manage Sites > [Site] > Settings
tip: Cấu hình mặc định về tiền tệ và thuế nằm trong Settings của Site trên `Administration > Sites > Manage Sites > [Site] > Settings`.

question: To update availability label text, which two areas are typical? (Select two)
explanation: Correct answer: A, B. [A] templates/resources/*.properties [B] ISML templates where displayed
tip: Thay đổi nhãn hiển thị thường bằng cách cập nhật `templates/resources/*.properties` và/hoặc template ISML nơi nhãn được hiển thị.

question: Maintainable controller design recommends: (Select one)
options: Thin controllers; business logic in helpers/decorators/factories
Place business logic in ISML for visibility
Use controllers exclusively for all logic
explanation: Correct answer: A. Thin controllers; business logic in helpers/decorators/factories
tip: Thiết kế controller mảnh: giữ logic nghiệp vụ trong helpers, decorators, factories; ISML chỉ để hiển thị.

question: Which directive enables fragment caching? (Select one)
explanation: Correct answer: A. iscache
tip: Dùng thẻ `<iscache>` trong ISML để bật caching cho fragment.

question: Proper CSRF handling requires: (Select one)
options: Generate token on GET; validate on POST (csrfProtection)
explanation: Correct answer: A. Generate token on GET; validate on POST (csrfProtection)
tip: Tạo token CSRF trên GET và xác thực trên POST; bật `csrfProtection` để bảo vệ form.

question: For a JSON response, which two are correct? (Select two)
explanation: Correct answer: A, B. [A] Set response Content-Type to application/json [B] Use res.json or write JSON
tip: Trả về JSON: thiết lập header `Content-Type: application/json` và dùng `res.json` hoặc ghi trực tiếp JSON, tránh render ISML.

question: To modify pricing without editing core controllers, use: (Select one)
explanation: Correct answer: A. Pricing/tax hook extension points
tip: Muốn tùy chỉnh tính giá/thuế mà không sửa controller lõi, cấu hình hook extension cho pricing/tax.

question: A list page does a synchronous per-item HTTP call. Which two remedies help? (Select two)
options: Use Service Framework with timeouts and circuit breaker
explanation: Correct answer: A, B. [A] Use Service Framework with timeouts and circuit breaker [B] Batch/cache to avoid N+1
tip: Tránh gọi HTTP đồng bộ từng item: dùng Service Framework với timeouts + circuit breaker và batch/cache để tránh N+1.

question: Localize UI strings using: (Select two)
explanation: Correct answer: A, B. [A] templates/resources/*.properties [B] Resource.msg/Resource.msgf
tip: Đa ngôn ngữ UI: thêm file `templates/resources/*.properties` và dùng `Resource.msg/Resource.msgf` để lấy chuỗi theo locale.

question: A remote include shows stale promo content. What’s the best fix? (Select one)
options: Add vary keys for promo/basket/customer or disable the include cache
explanation: Correct answer: A. Add vary keys for promo/basket/customer or disable the include cache
tip: Remote include stale: thêm vary keys (promo/basket/customer) cho fragment hoặc tắt cache cho include.

question: For a personalized Shop API, safe caching is: (Select one)
options: No cache or cache with vary (customer group/locale/currency)
explanation: Correct answer: A. No cache or cache with vary (customer group/locale/currency)
tip: API có nội dung cá nhân hóa: không cache hoặc cache kèm vary theo customer group/locale/currency.

question: A service returns HTTP 200 but an error object in body. What should you do? (Select one)
options: Parse domain-level status; handle error case
explanation: Correct answer: B. Parse domain-level status; handle error case
tip: Dù HTTP 200, vẫn phải parse body để kiểm tra domain-level status và xử lý lỗi tương ứng.

question: When collecting PII via forms, which two are correct? (Select two)
options: Restrict OCAPI Data permissions by least privilege
Log raw PII at DEBUG for support
explanation: Correct answer: A, B. [A] Minimize/encrypt sensitive fields where possible [B] Restrict OCAPI Data permissions by least privilege
tip: Thu thập PII: giảm thiểu và mã hóa trường nhạy cảm, áp dụng principle of least privilege cho quyền OCAPI.

question: A controller must stream a large CSV file. Best approach: (Select one)
options: Build all rows in memory first
explanation: Correct answer: A. Stream incrementally with headers
tip: Xuất file lớn: stream từng chunk, set header và gửi dần thay vì dựng toàn bộ trong bộ nhớ.

question: To allow baskets via OCAPI Shop, which two are needed? (Select two)
options: ocapi.json Shop permissions with allowed attributes
Client credentials mapped to that setting
explanation: Correct answer: A, B. [A] ocapi.json Shop permissions with allowed attributes [B] Client credentials mapped to that setting
tip: Cho phép basket qua OCAPI Shop: mở quyền trong `ocapi.json` và gán client credentials phù hợp.

question: A job imports inventory then updates search. Which two steps are typical? (Select two)
explanation: Correct answer: A, B. [A] Script step: import inventory [B] System step: delta/full indexing
tip: Luồng job: step script để import dữ liệu, sau đó step system để chạy delta/full indexing.

question: Common inbound file folders: (Select two)
explanation: Correct answer: A, B. [A] /impex/src/ [B] /impex/src/instance/
tip: Thư mục inbound thường là ` /impex/src/` hoặc ` /impex/src/instance/` để upload dữ liệu.

question: Two jobs sometimes collide on same records. Which two mitigations help? (Select two)
explanation: Correct answer: A, B. [A] Retry with exponential backoff [B] Coordinate schedules and locks (serialize)
tip: Xử lý xung đột job: dùng retry exponential backoff và đồng bộ lịch/khóa tài nguyên để serialize.

question: Least-privilege Data API for orders should: (Select two)
options: Use dedicated client credentials per integration
Share one global client across partners
explanation: Correct answer: A, B. [A] Limit read_attributes to required fields [B] Use dedicated client credentials per integration
tip: Áp dụng least-privilege: giới hạn `read_attributes` chỉ những trường cần thiết và dùng client credentials riêng cho từng integration.

question: Rotate a service credential without downtime by: (Select two)
options: Adding a new credential/profile and cutting over
explanation: Correct answer: A, C. [A] Add a new credential/profile and cut over [C] Support overlapping/dual keys during rotation to avoid downtime
tip: Quy trình rotate: tạo credential mới và cut‑over; nếu được, hỗ trợ overlapping keys để chấp nhận cả cặp cũ và mới khi chuyển đổi.

question: Robust synchronous integration typically includes: (Select two)
options: Retries with backoff for transient errors
explanation: Correct answer: A, B. [A] Short timeouts and circuit breaker [B] Retries with backoff for transient errors
tip: Tích hợp đồng bộ bền: timeout ngắn + circuit breaker và retry với backoff cho lỗi tạm thời.

question: Frequent product deltas should use: (Select one)
explanation: Correct answer: A. Delta reindex after each import
tip: Sản phẩm thay đổi thường xuyên: chạy delta reindex sau mỗi import thay vì full reindex.

question: Two job steps update the same object set. Best approach is: (Select one)
explanation: Correct answer: A. Lock/serialize or schedule exclusive windows
tip: Khi hai job cập nhật cùng bộ đối tượng: khóa/serialize hoặc chạy trong cửa sổ độc quyền để tránh xung đột.

question: Prevent sensitive token leakage by: (Select one)
options: Redacting/masking tokens in parser; avoid logging bodies unless masked
explanation: Correct answer: A. Redacting/masking tokens in parser; avoid logging bodies unless masked
tip: Không log token thô: mask/redact token và tránh log body trừ khi đã được che.

question: Profiler shows heavy per-tile service calls. Which two improvements help most? (Select two)
options: Precompute via jobs and decorate from storage
explanation: Correct answer: A, B. [A] Batch/cache calls [B] Precompute via jobs and decorate from storage
tip: Nếu profiler cho thấy nhiều call per-tile: batch/cache hoặc precompute qua job và đọc từ storage để giảm calls runtime.

question: Stale content persists after deploy. Which two actions help? (Select two)
explanation: Correct answer: A, B. [A] Clear application cache [B] Invalidate iscache fragments
tip: Nội dung cũ sau deploy: xóa application cache và invalidate các fragment `iscache` liên quan.

question: A large JSON export OOMs. Correct remediation: (Select one)
explanation: Correct answer: A. Stream chunks to response
tip: Export JSON lớn bị OOM: stream theo chunk ra response thay vì dựng toàn bộ JSON trong bộ nhớ.

question: Cache correctness issues are often due to: (Select two)
options: Using global cache with no vary
explanation: Correct answer: A, B. [A] Missing vary-by-locale/currency [B] Using global cache with no vary
tip: Lỗi cache thường do thiếu vary (locale/currency) hoặc dùng global cache không có các vary cần thiết.

question: New locale shows English strings. Which fixes apply? (Select two)
explanation: Correct answer: A, B. [A] Add locale-specific templates/resources/*.properties [B] Use Resource.msg/Resource.msgf
tip: Locale mới hiện tiếng Anh: thêm file `templates/resources/*.properties` cho locale đó và sử dụng `Resource.msg/Resource.msgf` để gọi chuỗi.

question: A route times out downstream. Best practices include: (Select three)
explanation: Correct answer: A, B, C. [A] Short timeouts (fail fast) [B] Retries with backoff [C] Circuit breaker
tip: Khi downstream chậm: đặt timeout ngắn, retry với backoff và dùng circuit breaker để bảo vệ hệ thống.

question: After release, PDP is slower by ~200ms. Which three diagnostics help isolate the cause? (Select three)
options: Compare Pipeline/Controller profiler traces from before and after the release.
Add targeted timing logs using dw.system.Logger to isolate hotspots.
Review 'diff' changes in services, decorators, and hooks in the new version.
Disable all log appenders to improve server IO speed.
explanation: Để chẩn đoán hiệu năng, thu thập profiler traces, thêm logging thời gian và rà soát diff thay đổi logic trong services/decorators/hooks.

question: Reduce ISML CPU by: (Select two)
options: Move complex business logic from templates to helpers or decorators.
Cache static or semi-static fragments using the <iscache> tag.
Add synchronous HTTP Service calls directly within ISML templates.
Implement heavy loops and data processing logic inside <isscript> blocks.
explanation: ISML nên dành cho hiển thị. Di chuyển logic tính toán sang tầng Model (Decorator) và sử dụng cache là hai cách hiệu quả nhất để giảm tải CPU cho server.
tip: Giảm CPU cho ISML: chuyển logic nặng sang helpers/decorators và cache fragment với `<iscache>`.

question: A PD component shows wrong currency on cache hits. What should you do? (Select one)
options: Add vary-by-currency on that cached fragment
explanation: Correct answer: A. Add vary-by-currency on that cached fragment
tip: PD component hiển thị sai tiền tệ do cache: thêm vary-by-currency cho fragment đang cache.

question: Prevent duplicate POST submissions during checkout: (Select two)
options: Implement idempotency keys with server-side deduplication logic.
Use client-side JavaScript to disable the submit button after the first click.
Switch the form method from POST to GET.
Disable CSRF protection to speed up submission processing.
explanation: Chặn ở Client (Disable button) là bước đầu, chặn ở Server (Idempotency) là bước cuối để đảm bảo dữ liệu đơn hàng không bị trùng lặp.
tip: Ngăn duplicate submit: disable button phía client và áp dụng idempotency key + dedupe phía server.

question: Catalog import and delta reindex overlap and fail. What’s the remedy? (Select one)
options: Coordinate schedules, lock shared resources, and add retries/backoff
explanation: Correct answer: A. Coordinate schedules, lock shared resources, and add retries/backoff
tip: Import và reindex xung đột: đồng bộ lịch chạy, khóa tài nguyên dùng chung, và thêm retry/backoff.

question: Which statement best describes the relationship between code versions and sites? (Select one)
options: Each site can only run the “active” global code version
Each site references a code version independently in its Settings
Each site must share the same code version to enable replication
Sites ignore code versions; cartridge path alone determines behavior
explanation: Correct answer: B. Each site references a code version independently in its Settings
tip: Mỗi Site có thể trỏ tới một code version riêng trong `Administration > Sites > Manage Sites > [Site] > Settings`.

question: Which directory is used by WebDAV to upload a cartridge for the active code version? (Select one)
explanation: Correct answer: A. /versioned/cartridges/<code-version>/cartridges
tip: Upload cartridge cho code version đang active qua folder ` /versioned/cartridges/<code-version>/cartridges` bằng WebDAV.

question: In SFRA, where are HTTP routes for controllers typically defined? (Select one)
options: In server-side JavaScript files using server.get/server.post
In Business Manager under URL Rules
explanation: Correct answer: B. In server-side JavaScript files using server.get/server.post
tip: Định nghĩa route trong SFRA thường nằm ở controller JS (`server.get` / `server.post`) bên server-side.

question: When extending app_storefront_base with custom functionality, which path ordering is recommended? (Select one)
options: System cartridges, then app_storefront_base, then custom, then base again
explanation: Correct answer: B. Custom cartridges first, then app_storefront_base
tip: Đặt custom cartridges trước `app_storefront_base` trong cartridge path để custom override được áp dụng.

question: What is the purpose of “decorators” in SFRA? (Select one)
options: To add CSS classes directly into ISML templates.
To add computed properties or behavior to models without modifying the base classes.
To convert raw JSON data into ISML rendering artifacts.
To bundle multiple cartridges into a single deployment unit.
explanation: Decorators được dùng để mở rộng (extend) dữ liệu của một đối tượng (như Product) trước khi gửi đến View mà không làm thay đổi logic gốc của base cartridge.
tip: Decorator thêm thuộc tính/behavior cho model mà không chỉnh sửa class gốc.

question: What is the primary benefit of the model-factory pattern in SFRA? (Select one)
options: Centralizes object construction and applies decorators consistently
Removes the need for ISML templates
explanation: Correct answer: B. Centralizes object construction and applies decorators consistently
tip: Model-factory tập trung việc tạo object và áp dụng decorators nhất quán trước khi render.

question: Which two files commonly appear in an SFRA controller module? (Select two)
explanation: Correct answer: A, B. [A] controller.js using server middleware [B] .isml template for rendering
tip: Một module controller thường gồm `controller.js` (đăng ký route) và file `.isml` để render view.

question: What is the impact of placing a custom cartridge after app_storefront_base in the site path? (Select one)
options: Only ISML templates from custom are used
explanation: Correct answer: B. app_storefront_base overrides custom definitions
tip: Nếu custom cartridge đứng sau `app_storefront_base`, thì definitions từ `app_storefront_base` có thể ghi đè custom; đặt custom trước để override.

question: Which action is required after uploading new controllers to the code version? (Select one)
options: Add/ensure cartridge path includes the cartridge and clear caches if necessary
Run a job to recompile scripts
explanation: Correct answer: B. Ensure the cartridge is on the cartridge path and clear application/template caches so the new controllers are picked up.
tip: Sau khi deploy controller: kiểm tra `cartridge path` và xóa cache ứng dụng/template để route mới được nhận.

question: Which statement best describes SFRA’s separation of concerns? (Select one)
options: Controllers hold business logic; templates hold minimal display logic; decorators/models add computed data
All logic should live in ISML for speed
explanation: Correct answer: A. SFRA separates responsibilities: controllers for business logic, ISML for presentation, and decorators/models for computed data.
tip: Tách rõ: controller xử lý logic, ISML hiển thị, decorators/models cung cấp dữ liệu tính toán.

question: How do you verify that a new controller route is resolvable? (Select one)
options: Access the route URL in the storefront and validate the response
explanation: Correct answer: C. Visit the route URL on the storefront to confirm it resolves and returns the expected response.
tip: Mở URL route trên storefront và kiểm tra response để xác thực route.

question: What is the effect of clearing application cache in Business Manager? (Select one)
options: Forces template and response caches to refresh so changes appear
explanation: Correct answer: B. Clearing application cache forces template and response caches to refresh so recent code/template changes appear.
tip: Xóa cache ứng dụng để làm mới template/response cache và hiển thị thay đổi mới deploy.

question: Where are product search synonyms configured? (Select one)
options: Merchant Tools > Products and Catalogs > Catalogs
explanation: Correct answer: A. Product search synonyms are configured in Merchant Tools > Search > Dictionaries.
tip: Cấu hình synonym cho search: `Merchant Tools > Search > Dictionaries`.

question: To make a custom product attribute searchable, which two actions are required? (Select two)
options: Mark the attribute as searchable in attribute definitions
Rebuild the search index after change
explanation: Correct answer: A, C. Mark the attribute as searchable in its definition and rebuild the search index so it becomes searchable.
tip: Đánh dấu attribute là searchable và chạy reindex để attribute xuất hiện trong kết quả tìm kiếm.

question: Where do you configure payment processors and methods for a site? (Select one)
options: Merchant Tools > Site Preferences > Payment Settings
explanation: Correct answer: B. Payment processors and methods are configured under Merchant Tools > Ordering > Payment Methods/Processors.
tip: Cấu hình phương thức/processor: `Merchant Tools > Ordering > Payment Methods/Processors`.

question: Which tool is used to import a catalog XML into a sandbox? (Select one)
explanation: Correct answer: A. Use Merchant Tools > Site Import & Export to import catalog XML.
tip: Dùng `Merchant Tools > Site Import & Export` để import catalog XML vào sandbox.

question: To display a new attribute on PDP, where might developers typically add code? (Select two)
explanation: Correct answer: A, B. Add data in product decorators/models and render in PDP ISML templates.
tip: Thêm xử lý ở decorator/model và hiển thị trong template PDP (ISML).

question: Which is the correct location to configure logs and custom categories? (Select one)
options: Business Manager > Administration > Operations > Logs Settings
explanation: Correct answer: B. Configure logs and custom categories in Business Manager > Administration > Operations > Logs Settings.
tip: Cấu hình logs: `Business Manager > Administration > Operations > Logs Settings`.

question: A merchandiser needs to curate content for the homepage. Which two features are most relevant? (Select two)
explanation: Correct answer: A, B. Use Content Assets and Page Designer to curate homepage content.
tip: Sử dụng Content Assets và Page Designer để quản trị nội dung trang chủ.

question: A data import fails with “invalid XML structure.” First step? (Select one)
options: Validate XML against the expected schema and correct the file
explanation: Correct answer: B. Validate the XML against the expected schema and fix structural errors before retrying.
tip: Kiểm tra và validate cấu trúc XML theo schema, sửa rồi import lại.

question: To expose a custom object externally via OCAPI Data, which two are needed? (Select two)
options: ocapi.json read/write attributes for the object
Client ID/secret mapped to the OCAPI settings
explanation: Correct answer: A, B. Configure read/write permissions for the object in `ocapi.json` and ensure a client credential is configured for OCAPI access.
tip: Đặt quyền read/write cho object trong `ocapi.json` và cấu hình Client ID/secret cho OCAPI.

question: What is a common sign that you should introduce a custom object type? (Select one)
options: To persist domain data not fitting existing system objects (e.g., external mappings)
To hold image binaries rendered by templates
explanation: Correct answer: B. Use a custom object when you need to persist domain-specific data that doesn't map to built-in objects.
tip: Dùng custom object khi cần lưu dữ liệu domain không vừa với object hệ thống sẵn có.

question: Where do you configure search refinements (facets)? (Select one)
explanation: Correct answer: A. Configure search refinements under Merchant Tools > Search > Search Refinements.
tip: Cấu hình facets: `Merchant Tools > Search > Search Refinements`.

question: After creating a new searchable attribute, the storefront still doesn’t return results. Which two steps are likely missing? (Select two)
options: Add the attribute to ReadAttributes in ocapi.json
Ensure the attribute is assigned to the product type and populated
explanation: Correct answer: A, C. Rebuild the search index and ensure the attribute is assigned to product type and populated with data.
tip: Sau khi tạo attribute searchable: chạy reindex và đảm bảo attribute đã gán cho product type và có dữ liệu.

question: What middleware should wrap POST form routes to protect against CSRF? (Select one)
explanation: Correct answer: B. Use CSRF protection middleware (validate request + token generation) for POST form routes.
tip: Bọc route POST bằng middleware CSRF (`csrfProtection.validateRequest` + generate token) để bảo vệ.

question: How do you send data from a controller to a template? (Select one)
explanation: Correct answer: B. Use res.render with the template path and a data object to pass data to the template.
tip: Dùng `res.render('path/to/template', dataObject)` để truyền dữ liệu từ controller sang template.

question: A controller must return JSON. Which two steps are correct? (Select two)
options: Use res.json or write JSON string to response
Render an ISML template that outputs JSON
explanation: Correct answer: A, B. Set the Content-Type to application/json and use res.json or write a JSON string to the response.
tip: Thiết header `Content-Type: application/json` và dùng `res.json` hoặc ghi JSON vào response.

question: Where should complex pricing logic be implemented for maintainability? (Select one)
options: Within pricing-related hooks and/or decorators used by the model layer
explanation: Correct answer: B. Implement complex pricing logic in pricing hooks/decorators at the model layer for maintainability and reuse.
tip: Đặt logic giá phức tạp vào pricing hooks hoặc decorators ở tầng model để dễ bảo trì và tái sử dụng.

question: Which ISML tag enables a separately cachable component rendering? (Select one)
explanation: Correct answer: B. `iscomponent` marks a component that can be rendered/cached separately.
tip: Dùng tag `iscomponent` để render component có thể cache riêng biệt.

question: Which three artifacts are typical when implementing a custom form? (Select three)
options: Client-side only validation; server validation optional
Form binding/validation via SFCC Form API
explanation: Correct answer: A, B, D. Typical artifacts: forms XML, server-side POST route with CSRF, and SFCC Form API binding/validation.
tip: Cần: file forms XML, route server.post với CSRF, và binding/validation bằng SFCC Form API (không chỉ client-side).

question: Which hook type allows you to modify basket or price calculation without editing controllers? (Select one)
options: Documented pricing/tax calculation hook extension points
explanation: Correct answer: C. Use documented pricing/tax hook extension points to alter basket/price calculations.
tip: Dùng các pricing/tax hook extension point để thay đổi tính toán giá/basket mà không sửa controller.

question: Best practice for logging messages from controllers/models? (Select one)
explanation: Correct answer: B. Use dw.system.Logger with appropriate categories and levels (info/debug/error).
tip: Dùng `dw.system.Logger.getLogger(...)` với category và level phù hợp để ghi log.

question: ISML localization uses which mechanism? (Select one)
explanation: Correct answer: B. ISML templates use `templates/resources/*.properties` files per locale for localization.
tip: Đặt chuỗi đa ngôn ngữ trong `templates/resources/*.properties` theo từng locale.

question: A controller uses multiple synchronous service calls per request leading to timeouts. Which two fixes help? (Select two)
options: Use Service Framework with timeouts/retries/circuit breakers
Log all payloads at DEBUG always
explanation: Correct answer: A, B. Cache responses where safe and use Service Framework settings (timeouts/retries/circuit breakers).
tip: Cache kết quả dịch vụ khi hợp lý; cấu hình timeouts/retries/circuit-breaker trong Service Framework.

question: A page fragment must vary by locale and currency. What is recommended? (Select one)
options: Use iscache with vary keys or res.cachePeriod with varyBy parameters
explanation: Correct answer: B. Use `iscache` with vary keys or `res.cachePeriod` with `varyBy` to vary cached fragments by locale/currency.
tip: Dùng `iscache`/`res.cachePeriod` với keys `varyBy` để cache theo locale và currency.

question: After deploying a new template, changes don’t appear. What are two likely remedies? (Select two)
explanation: Correct answer: A, C. Clear application cache and invalidate template/component caches so the new template is served.
tip: Nếu template không cập nhật: xóa application cache và invalidate các template/component cache (`iscache`).

question: Which three Service Framework settings are essential for resilient integrations? (Select three)
options: Full payload logging at all times
explanation: Correct answer: A, B, D. Use connection/socket timeouts, retries/circuit-breakers, and a response parser with optional caching. Avoid full payload logging all the time.
tip: Cấu hình timeout, retry/circuit-breaker, và response parser/caching; không bật logging payload đầy đủ liên tục.

question: Where do you securely store API credentials for services? (Select one)
explanation: Correct answer: A. Store API credentials securely in Business Manager service credentials (or the platform's secure store), not in templates or code.
tip: Lưu trữ credentials an toàn trong Business Manager service credentials (không lưu trong code/templates).

question: To allow access to baskets via OCAPI Shop API, which two are required? (Select two)
explanation: Correct answer: A, B. Grant Shop API permissions for baskets in `ocapi.json` and ensure a client credential exists for OCAPI access.
tip: Mở quyền basket trong `ocapi.json` và cấu hình Client ID/secret để truy cập OCAPI.

question: A nightly job must import inventory and refresh search. Which two steps are typical? (Select two)
options: System step to trigger delta search index
explanation: Correct answer: A, C. Typical job steps: a script step to import inventory and a system step to trigger a delta search index.
tip: Job thường gồm step import inventory (script) và trigger delta search index; không cần tắt cache toàn cục.

question: Which WebDAV directories are typically used for import sources? (Select two)
explanation: Correct answer: A, B. Typical import sources are under `/impex/src/` and `/impex/src/instance/` on WebDAV.
tip: Đường dẫn import thường dùng: `/impex/src/` và `/impex/src/instance/` trên WebDAV.

question: A job intermittently fails due to locked resources. Which two mitigations help? (Select two)
explanation: Correct answer: A, C. Implement retries with backoff and pre-check locks to skip or wait to avoid contention.
tip: Dùng retry với exponential backoff và kiểm tra lock trước (skip/wait) để giảm lỗi do lock.

question: When should an integration be asynchronous? (Select two)
options: When long-running and not required for immediate shopper response
When work can be queued and retried without blocking the request path
When needed to show real-time prices at checkout
explanation: Correct answer: A, B. Use asynchronous integration for long-running tasks or work that can be queued/retried without blocking shopper requests.
tip: Chọn async khi tác vụ chạy lâu hoặc có thể queue/retry mà không chặn yêu cầu của người dùng.

question: To prevent sensitive data from appearing in logs, what is recommended? (Select one)
options: Redact/mask sensitive fields in response parser before logging
Print to console instead of Logger
explanation: Correct answer: B. Redact or mask sensitive fields in parsers before logging; never log secrets in plain text.
tip: Trước khi log, redact/mask các trường nhạy cảm; không log thông tin nhạy cảm dưới dạng plain text.

question: OCAPI customization logic (hooks) lives where? (Select one)
options: A cartridge implementing documented hook scripts, registered in path
explanation: Correct answer: B. Hook implementations live in a cartridge with documented hook scripts registered on the path; `ocapi.json` only maps endpoints/permissions.
tip: Logic hook của OCAPI nằm trong cartridge (script hooks) và cần đăng ký vào cartridge path; `ocapi.json` chỉ cấu hình endpoint/permission.

question: A PIM pushes product deltas hourly. Efficient indexing strategy? (Select one)
explanation: Correct answer: B. Use delta reindex after each import to process only changed items and keep indexing efficient.
tip: Với delta từ PIM, dùng delta reindex sau mỗi import để chỉ index các thay đổi.

question: A service endpoint begins timing out. Which three actions improve resiliency? (Select three)
options: Add retries with backoff and circuit breakers
explanation: Correct answer: A, B, C. Fail fast, implement retries/backoff/circuit-breakers, and cache responses where appropriate to improve resiliency.
tip: Giảm timeout để fail-fast, thêm retry/backoff/circuit-breaker và cache kết quả khi có thể.

question: Which two job step types are common in B2C Commerce? (Select two)
explanation: Correct answer: A, B. [A] Script step (custom JS) [B] System step (built-in function)
tip: Xác định loại job (Script vs System) khi hỏi về bước trong Jobs.

question: Which two platform-level caches are commonly used for storefront performance? (Select two)
explanation: Correct answer: A, B. [A] iscache in templates [B] Response cache (res.cachePeriod/varyBy)
tip: Tập trung vào caching ở tầng template (iscache) và response (res.cachePeriod).

question: Which two patterns reduce controller complexity? (Select two)
options: Keep controllers thin; leverage services for integrations
Put everything in a single controller file
explanation: Correct answer: A, C. [A] Move domain logic to helpers/decorators/factories [C] Keep controllers thin; leverage services for integrations
tip: Tách logic miền ra khỏi controller; sử dụng services để kết nối hệ thống bên ngoài.

question: For localization of UI text, which two practices are correct? (Select two)
explanation: Correct answer: A, C. [A] Use templates/resources/*.properties by locale [C] Use Resource.msg/Resource.msgf to fetch strings
tip: Dùng `templates/resources/*.properties` và APIs Resource.msg/Resource.msgf để lấy chuỗi theo locale.

question: Which two anti-patterns hurt scalability? (Select two)
options: Repeated synchronous service calls without caching
explanation: Correct answer: A, B. [A] Repeated synchronous service calls without caching [B] Excessive logic in templates
tip: Tránh gọi dịch vụ đồng bộ nhiều lần (N+1) và đặt logic quá nặng trong ISML.

question: A template snippet is static and identical for all users. Best caching approach? (Select one)
explanation: Correct answer: C. res.cachePeriod(0)
tip: Sử dụng cấu hình response cache phù hợp cho nội dung tĩnh; kiểm tra `res.cachePeriod`.

question: Which two steps help diagnose a slow route? (Select two)
options: Enable targeted log categories and inspect request logs
Use BM profiler to measure controller time
explanation: Correct answer: A, B. [A] Enable targeted log categories and inspect request logs [B] Use BM profiler to measure controller time
tip: Bật log có mục tiêu và dùng profiler trong BM để đo thời gian controller.

question: Which practice best protects against CSRF on forms? (Select one)
options: Use csrfProtection middleware on POST, generate and validate tokens
